name: nabd-core-pay-kit
description: A Claude Code kit to configure and operate the Nabd Core + Pay payroll platform on a local machine and generate professional Key User Training (KUT) material for its business processes — from real, captured screenshots. Ships three specialist skills (Trainer, Consultant, Documents Generator), two operational skills (Environment Setup, Anomaly Recorder), a knowledge base, a branded Word+Slides build pipeline, and slash commands.
